sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17449" key="au)lomelw|di/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐλο-μελῳδία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n17449.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flute</tr_>- or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pipe-music,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
